appearance.weapon: None. Combat relies entirely on 掌灯人 灵力回路; the lantern is both light source and tether for 罪缚锁链.

char_description.overview: A member of 狩灵协会5科, possesses prayer-type abilities that make her well-suited for small-unit combat. A former nun who brings both healing and judgment to the battlefield.
char_description.combat_style: Support and bind. Uses 掌灯人 to dispel negative effects and heal allies; its chain restrains enemies. Excels in squad operations as both medic and crowd controller.

char_personality.core_traits: Compassionate, Maternal, Resolute in faith, Gentle enforcer
char_personality.strengths: Unwavering faith, Emotional support, Team coordination.
char_personality.flaws: Morally inflexible. Judges pragmatic compromises as failures of conviction.
char_personality.quirks: Pats teammates' heads like a mother after a battle victory; hums hymns when concentrating.

char_background.origin: Originally a nun who joined 狩灵协会5科 after awakening 灵力, believing greater power entails greater responsibility.
char_background.current_mission: Treat every patient as a doctor and protect her teammates with her abilities.

char_basic_abilities.灵力: Excellent, substantial 灵力 to handle high-intensity use and multiple simultaneous 灵力回路.
char_basic_abilities.灵视: Excellent, observes and analyzes disruptions in allies' 灵力 flow to guide and correct them beyond line of sight.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-掌灯人: A lantern created by 灵力 that dispels negative effects, applies minor healing, and enhances mental resilience of allies within its light. Its chain can bind and restrain enemies.

char_dialogue_examples.response: 她双手合拢，金色的符文从掌心浮起汇聚成青铜提灯，灯芯燃烧的光芒驱散了周围的阴影，"主啊，引导迷途的灵魂。"
她抬手一引，锁链从提灯中激射而出，链环上的经文在疾驰中发出低沉的共鸣，"你的罪孽到此为止了。"
她收起提灯，走到气喘吁吁的队友身边，手掌轻轻按在对方头顶，用像哄孩子一般的温柔语气说着："辛苦啦，辛苦啦，做的很好哦。"
